overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a Los Santos sidewalk at night. The player moves steadily past residential hedges and trash bags while sports cars occasionally drive by on the adjacent street under streetlights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential sidewalk with street parking

events.description: red sports car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a hedge row, approaching trash bags and a fire hydrant

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving down the street from right to left

entered.detail: well-maintained green hedge along the residential property line
two-story houses with illuminated windows behind the hedges
low-rise commercial structures with lit signage across the street
tall street lamp casting light on the sidewalk
bright yellow fire hydrant on the curb ahead
black garbage bags piled next to a trash can

segments.scene_description: Walking along a residential sidewalk at night, passing by hedges and approaching trash bags. A red sports car drives by on the adjacent street under streetlights.

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward, passing the yellow fire hydrant and trash bags on the left

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk past the yellow fire hydrant and trash bags. A dark sedan drives by on the street as the camera moves forward toward the distant intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a quiet residential sidewalk at night, progressing from a secluded stretch of hedges toward a distant urban intersection. It begins by gliding past manicured greenery and piles of trash bags while a red sports car streaks by under the glow of streetlights. As the camera maintains its steady forward pace, the scenery shifts to pass a bright yellow fire hydrant and more refuse lining the curb. The scene then opens up as a dark sedan drives past on the adjacent street, with the perspective continuing to push forward toward the lights of the approaching crossroads.
